item.title: 100% PCR Kraft Telescopic-Lid Eco Candle & Home Fragrance Box
item.description: 100% PCR kraft telescopic-lid eco candle and home fragrance box — the ultimate circular-economy packaging for conscious consumer brands, from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a 23-year packaging manufacturing leader. This two-piece telescopic box (separate lid + base) is constructed entirely from 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) kraft paperboard, delivering authentic eco-credentials without compromising on structural integrity or print quality. The natural kraft aesthetic with visible recycled fiber flecks communicates genuine sustainability — not greenwashed marketing. Suitable for soy candles (8oz, 12oz, 16oz), reed diffusers, wax melts, room sprays, essential oil sets, and incense gift collections. Customization includes die-cut display windows (with compostable PLA film option), soy-based ink printing, FSC-compatible metallic foil stamping, and embossing. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV offset presses with water-based adhesive assembly. Our 18,000 sqm facility delivers 1.7M boxes daily under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Recycled certification. OK Compost INDUSTRIAL certified (EN 13432 compliant).

item.title: Compostable Kraft Paper Chocolate Gift Box with PLA Window Soy Ink Printing
item.description: Compostable kraft paper chocolate gift box with PLA bioplastic window — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience. Every component — from the FSC-certified kraft board and PLA window to the soy-based inks and water-based adhesive — is certified industrially compostable under EN 13432 and ASTM D6400 standards. This box provides artisan chocolatiers and eco-conscious confectionery brands with packaging that decomposes into biomass, water, and CO₂ within 90 days in commercial composting facilities, leaving zero microplastics behind.

item.title: FSC Kraft Drawer Pull Box with Bamboo Fiber Tray Eco Jewelry Organic Packaging
item.description: FSC-certified kraft drawer pull box with bamboo fiber molded insert tray, designed for eco-conscious jewelry and organic product packaging by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The drawer pull design features a smooth-gliding interior tray that slides out with a natural jute pull, revealing the bamboo fiber insert — a 100% plastic-free alternative to foam or PET inserts. Printed with soy-based inks on FSC-certified kraft paperboard, this box meets the highest sustainability standards for brands committed to circular economy principles. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes + 220,000+ gift boxes.

item.title: Kraft Eco Jewelry Gift Box — Hemp Cord Tie + Seed Paper Hang Tag
item.description: Kraft eco jewelry gift box with hemp cord tie and seed paper hang tag — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. This 100% post-consumer recycled kraft board jewelry box combines rustic charm with genuine sustainability. The hemp cord tie closure replaces synthetic ribbons, while the attached seed paper hang tag is embedded with wildflower seeds — customers can plant it to grow flowers. Soy-based inks print custom branding without petroleum-derived solvents. The natural kraft aesthetic is ideal for artisan jewelers, eco-conscious brands, and brands communicating authentic sustainability values. Produced on our KBA Rapida 1050 press and Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutter across our 18,000 sqm factory with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Kraft Eco-Friendly Soap Bar Sleeve Box with Die-Cut Window
item.description: Kraft Eco-Friendly Soap Bar Sleeve Box with die-cut window by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of manufacturing excellence (founded 2003). The tuck-end sleeve design is easy to assemble and ideal for artisan soap bars, bath bombs, natural deodorants, and organic skincare products. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across our 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million color boxes.

item.title: Kraft Paper Artisan Candle Gift Box with Hemp Rope Handle & Soy Ink Botanical Print
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Artisan Candle Gift Box brings together uncompromising sustainability credentials with artisanal aesthetics. Every material in this box has been selected for end-of-life circularity: the 1.5mm rigid greyboard is 100% post-consumer recycled, the exterior wrap is FSC-certified 157gsm kraft paper printed with soy-based botanical inks (zero petroleum solvents), the carry handle is natural undyed hemp rope, and the interior candle tray is molded from PLA (polylactic acid) certified to EN 13432 for industrial composting. The botanical print series — featuring six nature-inspired illustrations (lavender fields, eucalyptus sprigs, heritage roses, citrus groves, pine forests, chamomile blooms) — is printed on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press using soy-based inks that produce rich, matte colors without the chemical odor of conventional petroleum inks. When the candle is enjoyed and the box has served its gifting purpose, the entire package (minus the hemp rope, which is reusable) can be composted or recycled in standard paper streams.

item.title: Kraft Paper Box with Soy-Based Ink Printing for Organic Skincare Packaging
item.description: Fully recyclable kraft paper box with soy-based ink printing — purpose-designed for organic skincare, clean beauty, and sustainable wellness brands. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. Every component is chosen for end-of-life recyclability: FSC-certified unbleached kraft board, vegetable-based soy ink (VOC-free, unlike petroleum inks), water-based adhesive, and an optional PLA (polylactic acid) biodegradable window film derived from corn starch. No plastic lamination — the natural uncoated kraft surface communicates eco-authenticity to the growing segment of sustainability-conscious consumers (73% of Gen Z and Millennials willing to pay more for sustainable packaging, per First Insight). 18,000 sqm factory in Foshan, Guangdong. 23 years of manufacturing experience.

item.title: Kraft Paper Coffee Bean Gift Box with One-Way Degassing Valve Window and Compostable PLA Liner
item.description:
Product Overview

This kraft paper coffee bean gift box is purpose-engineered for the specialty coffee industry — combining the functionality of a one-way degassing valve with the sustainability credentials of FSC-certified kraft board, soy-based ink printing, and a home-compostable PLA inner liner. Freshly roasted coffee beans release CO₂ for days after roasting; without a degassing valve, rigid packaging would balloon or burst. The integrated one-way valve window on this kraft box allows controlled CO₂ release while blocking oxygen ingress, preserving the beans’ volatile aromatic compounds and extending peak flavor window by 2–4 weeks. Every box is manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing using KBA Rapida 1050 4-color offset with soy-based inks, Bobst SP 102 BMA die-cutting, and 350gsm FSC-certified kraft board. With 23 years of paper box manufacturing, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and 1.7 million daily box output from an 18,000 sqm facility, Bincai delivers packaging that specialty coffee roasters can trust for quality and sustainability.

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco-Friendly Soap Packaging Box with Window Soy-Based Ink
item.description: Kraft paper eco-friendly soap packaging box with die-cut window and soy-based ink printing by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003). Designed for handmade soap bars, organic skincare products, natural deodorants, bath bombs, and eco-conscious cosmetic brands. Made from FSC certified kraft paper with compostable PLA window film or recyclable PET window. Printed with vegetable-based soy ink for full environmental compatibility. The entire package is curbside recyclable in paper streams. Produced across 18,000 sqm facility. Daily output: 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Kraft Paper Essential Oil Gift Set Box with Bamboo Fiber Insert and Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description: The kraft paper essential oil gift set box with bamboo fiber insert is Bincai’s answer to the clean beauty industry’s demand for packaging as pure as the product inside. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, this fully compostable gift box combines five sustainable materials — FSC-certified kraft board, molded bamboo fiber tray, soy-based ink, jute twine closure, and PLA (corn starch) window film — into one petroleum-free packaging solution. The natural kraft exterior printed with vibrant soy-based inks delivers shelf appeal without environmental compromise, while the thermoformed bamboo fiber insert cradles each essential oil bottle in precision-molded cavities. Produced on KBA Rapida 1050 4-color (soy-ink optimized) and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. MOQ 500.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Bamboo Fiber Tray and Cotton Drawstring — Sustainable Corporate Welcome Kit
item.description:
Product Overview

This kraft paper gift box combines an FSC-certified kraft board shell with a molded bamboo fiber interior tray and organic cotton drawstring closure — engineered for corporate welcome kits and sustainable brand gifting where environmental credentials are central to the brand message. Every component is plastic-free: the kraft board is printed with soy-based inks, the interior tray is molded bamboo fiber (home-compostable per EN 13432), and the closure uses undyed organic cotton drawstring. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing on Heidelberg offset presses with dedicated eco-line production that prevents cross-contamination with conventional materials, every box supports brand sustainability claims with third-party certifications. With 23 years of packaging expertise, ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, and 220,000+ daily output across an 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai delivers eco-packaging at industrial scale without compromising quality or aesthetics.

item.title: Kraft Paper Tea Sampler Gift Box with Bamboo Fiber Compartment Tray and Jute Tie Closure
item.description:
Product Overview

The kraft paper tea sampler gift box with bamboo fiber compartment tray and jute tie closure is a fully compostable packaging solution engineered for premium loose-leaf tea brands, herbal tea gift sets, and specialty tea subscription boxes. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing (founded 2003, Foshan, 18,000 sqm, ISO 9001:2015 & FSC-C147399 certified), this box combines unbleached 350gsm kraft board with a molded bamboo fiber compartment tray — eliminating plastic at every touchpoint. Soy-based inks print directly on kraft with vibrant, low-VOC color, and a natural jute twine tie replaces synthetic ribbons. Daily output reaches 1.7 million boxes on KBA Rapida 105 and Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV presses.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Window — Eco-Friendly Recyclable Soap & Candle Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Minimalist kraft paper gift box designed for eco-conscious brands selling handmade soaps, artisan candles, bath bombs, and natural cosmetics. The 100% recycled kraft board (400gsm, unbleached) gives a warm, organic aesthetic that communicates sustainability at first glance. A precision die-cut window covered with PLA compostable film allows product visibility while maintaining a 100% plastic-free, biodegradable construction. The tuck-top closure with thumb notch opens effortlessly for retail browsing. Printed with soy-based inks in 1-2 colors — perfect for brand logos, ingredient callouts, or minimalist patterns. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) — 23 years of sustainable packaging innovation.

item.title: Kraft Paper Greeting Card Gift Set Box with Seed-Embedded Hang Tag
item.description:
Product Overview

This kraft paper greeting card gift set box is designed for artisan stationery brands, greeting card publishers, and eco-conscious gift retailers. The box is constructed from 100% recycled 400gsm kraft board and printed with vegetable-based soy ink that is fully biodegradable. A die-cut window on the lid allows customers to see the greeting card designs inside without opening the box, while the natural jute twine closure adds rustic charm and eliminates plastic fasteners entirely. Each box includes a plantable seed-embedded hang tag — made from post-consumer recycled paper embedded with wildflower seeds (daisy, poppy, and snapdragon mix) that can be planted to grow flowers. The box is 100% recyclable, compostable, and biodegradable. Produced by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing — manufacturing premium sustainable packaging since 2003 — our 18,000 sqm ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified facility ensures every box meets rigorous environmental and quality standards. Ideal for greeting card sets, customizable stationery kits, wedding invitation suites, thank-you card collections, and artisan paper goods.

item.title: Kraft Paper Honeycomb Wine Shipper — Biodegradable Molded Pulp Interior with Jute Handle
item.description: The kraft paper honeycomb wine shipper represents a breakthrough in sustainable wine logistics — combining FSC-certified kraft outer construction with a hexagonal honeycomb structural core that delivers crush resistance rivaling double-wall corrugated at 40% less material weight. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a 23-year Foshan packaging specialist with 18,000 sqm of dual-factory production — this shipper uses 100% biodegradable molded pulp bottle cradles and jute rope carry handles for a fully home-compostable packaging system.

item.title: Kraft Paper Sustainable Cosmetics Gift Set Box with Bamboo Fiber Tray and Soy-Based Ink
item.description: Kraft paper sustainable cosmetics gift set box with compostable bamboo fiber tray and soy-based ink printing — purpose-designed for clean beauty, organic skincare, and eco-conscious cosmetics brands that demand packaging as sustainable as the products inside. The 100% recycled kraft board exterior printed with soy-based inks communicates natural authenticity, while the molded bamboo fiber tray provides a compostable, plastic-free alternative to traditional foam inserts. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses deliver precise printing across 18,000 sqm dual-factory campus. Daily output 1.7 million boxes. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified.

item.title: Kraft Paper Sustainable Fashion Apparel Mailer — Eco-Friendly Clothing Box
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s kraft paper sustainable fashion apparel mailer is engineered for clothing brands that have made sustainability a core brand value — and need packaging that proves it. Constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled kraft board on our BHS 2.5m corrugator, this mailer uses soy-based inks for printing and water-based adhesive for closure. The integrated tear strip provides a premium unboxing experience — no scissors, no frustration — while the self-seal strip eliminates plastic tape entirely. Flat-packed for efficient warehousing, these mailers assemble in under 3 seconds. Every component — board, ink, adhesive — is designed for curbside recycling in a single stream. Manufactured in our Foshan smart factory (18,000 sqm) with Heidelberg 7+1 UV offset for brand-quality printing even on kraft surfaces. FSC chain-of-custody certified.

item.title: Kraft Paper Tea Gift Set Box — Soy Ink Printed, Compostable Insert Tray
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. manufactures this 100% recyclable kraft paper tea gift set box for eco-conscious tea brands. Every component — from the FSC-certified kraft board exterior to the compostable molded pulp insert tray — is plastic-free and fully recyclable in standard paper streams. Soy-based inks print directly onto the kraft surface using our KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press, achieving rich, natural-looking graphics without petroleum-based solvents. The rigid-box construction (2.0mm greyboard + kraft wrap) provides premium shelf presence while the molded pulp insert cradles 6-12 tea sachets or 2-3 loose-leaf tins securely. Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility, each box undergoes Seven-Stage QC with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification confirming every shipment’s traceable origin. Daily output of 1.7 million boxes supports bulk orders with consistent quality.

item.title: Kraft Paper Wine Bottle Gift Bag with Die-Cut Handle Gold Foil Eco-Luxury
item.description:
Product Overview

Our kraft paper wine bottle gift bag marries eco-conscious materials with luxury presentation through the striking combination of natural kraft texture and gold foil stamping. Constructed from 250gsm FSC-certified kraft paper, the bag features a reinforced die-cut handle, square-bottom gusset, and is precision-sized for standard 750ml wine bottles. Gold foil hot stamping on the uncoated kraft surface creates an organic-luxury aesthetic — the warmth of kraft contrasting with metallic brilliance — that resonates with today’s sustainability-minded wine consumers. All printing uses soy-based inks (USDA BioPreferred certified) for complete biodegradability. Manufactured on our KBA 1050 4-color offset press at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated factory. Every bag passes 7-stage QC from kraft grammage verification to final packaging audit. With 23 years of paper packaging expertise, we deliver wine bags that tell your brand’s story before the bottle is even revealed.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Soap Gift Box — Hemp Twine Tie Closure with Natural Brown Mailer
item.description: Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise) presents this fully compostable recycled Kraft soap gift box — designed for artisanal soap makers, natural skincare brands, and zero-waste subscription services. Manufactured in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility under ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, every box uses 100% post-consumer recycled Kraft board printed with soy-based inks and closed with a natural hemp twine tie — no plastic, no laminates, no synthetic adhesives.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Wine Bottle Gift Box with Carry Handle — Eco-Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) kraft board in a completely plastic-free design — no lamination, no synthetic coatings, no plastic windows. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Recycled (FSC-STD-40-007) certified. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility produces 1.7 million boxes daily with a dedicated eco-packaging line.

item.title: Seed Paper Kraft Gift Box with Embedded Wildflower Seeds Eco Wedding Favor
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai’s plantable seed paper kraft gift box transforms packaging from waste into wildflowers. The box body is FSC-certified recycled kraft board, and the lid or decorative band is hand-laid seed paper embedded with 12 wildflower species. After use, the seed paper component can be planted — soaked in water, placed 0.5cm deep in soil, watered regularly, and wildflowers emerge in 7–21 days. The entire box (excluding the seed paper, which is meant to be planted) is ASTM D6400 industrially compostable. Printed with soy-based inks (VOC ≤0.5%) and assembled with water-based PVA adhesive (FDA 21 CFR 175.105). Ideal for eco-conscious wedding favors, sustainable corporate gifts, green beauty brands, and zero-waste retail packaging. 23 years of manufacturing. ISO 9001:2015 & FSC certified.

item.title: Bamboo-Fiber Kraft Eco Gift Box with Seed Paper Tag Biodegradable
item.description: Innovative bamboo-fiber kraft eco gift box — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier with 23 years of experience. The board combines 30% fast-renewable bamboo fiber with 70% post-consumer recycled (PCR) content, printed with soy-based inks for full biodegradability. The crowning feature is a detachable plantable seed paper hang tag embedded with wildflower or herb seeds — after unboxing, the recipient plants the tag and grows flowers, creating a memorable circular-economy brand moment. Every component is home compostable within 90–180 days. Ideal for eco-conscious beauty, wellness, organic food, and sustainable fashion brands that want packaging to match their values. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses across 18,000 sqm factory.

item.title: Compostable Kraft Window Tea Box with PLA Film — Organic Loose Leaf Packaging

Printed with soy-based inks and assembled with water-based adhesives, this box meets EN 13432 compostability standards while delivering the shelf presence organic tea brands demand. Manufactured on KBA 1050 4-color offset presses in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise.

item.title: Custom Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Cotton Drawstring — Reusable Eco-Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Cotton Drawstring Closure is a packaging object that consumers keep. Its architectural silhouette — a four-sided pyramid with a soft cotton drawstring emerging from the apex — transforms product packaging from disposable wrapper to reusable keepsake. Unlike conventional boxes that are discarded seconds after unboxing, this pyramid box becomes a jewelry holder, a desk organizer, a bathroom cotton-ball container, or simply a decorative object on a shelf — extending the brand’s presence in the consumer’s life for months or years.

item.title: FSC Certified Kraft Paper Drawer Box — Bamboo Pull Handle & Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description:
Product Overview

FSC certified kraft paper drawer box designed for eco-conscious brands seeking fully sustainable luxury packaging. The slide-out drawer mechanism features a natural bamboo pull handle and an internal cotton ribbon stop to prevent drawer separation. Exterior printing uses soy-based inks on uncoated kraft paperboard for a tactile, organic aesthetic that communicates environmental commitment. The entire box — board, ink, adhesive, and handle — is 100% recyclable in standard paper waste streams and home-compostable (EN 13432 compliant materials). Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) in our FSC Chain-of-Custody certified Foshan facility with 1.7M daily output capacity.

item.title: Kraft Brown Gift Box with Jute Twine Handle — Handmade Soap & Candle Eco Packaging
item.description: The kraft brown gift box with jute twine handle represents Bincai’s commitment to sustainable packaging without compromising on structural integrity or brand presentation. Constructed from 350gsm FSC-certified kraft paperboard with water-based PVA adhesive and printed with soy-based inks, this box is 100% recyclable in standard paper streams and fully biodegradable. The natural jute twine handle — sourced from renewable jute fiber — provides both functional carrying convenience and a tactile, rustic aesthetic that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years) at our ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified 18,000 sqm Foshan facility.

item.title: Kraft Eco-Friendly Gift Box with Soy-Based Ink and Natural Jute Handle
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Eco-Friendly Gift Box represents our commitment to sustainable packaging without compromising on premium presentation. Constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled kraft board, printed with soy-based inks on our state-of-the-art KBA 1050 4-color offset press and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press, assembled with biodegradable water-based adhesive, and finished with a natural jute rope handle — this box contains zero plastic from board to handle to adhesive. The uncoated kraft surface provides a tactile, organic feel that resonates with eco-conscious consumers, while the jute handle adds functional elegance. Perfect for brands that put sustainability at the center of their identity. Manufactured across our 18,000 sqm Foshan smart factory and 10,000 sqm production base, with FSC Recycled (FSC-R) Chain-of-Custody certification, ISO 9001:2015 quality management, and a daily output of 1.7 million units backed by 23 years of paper packaging expertise.

item.title: Kraft Paper Bento Lunch Box with Bamboo Cutlery Compartment — Biodegradable Food Packaging
item.description:
Sustainable kraft paper bento lunch box with integrated bamboo cutlery compartment, manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com, Audited Supplier. Made from FSC-certified kraft board with PLA (polylactic acid) moisture barrier, printed with soy-based inks. Fully compostable in industrial composting facilities within 90 days. Designed for takeaway, meal prep delivery, corporate catering, and eco-conscious food service.

Features

  • FSC-certified 350-450gsm kraft board — natural brown kraft with visible fiber texture
  • PLA (polylactic acid) interior coating — plant-based moisture and grease barrier, no petroleum plastics
  • Soy-based ink printing — non-toxic, renewable, compostable alongside the board
  • Integrated bamboo cutlery slot — holds disposable bamboo fork, knife, and spoon set
  • 3-compartment or 4-compartment tray design — separates main course, sides, and sauce/dressing
  • Locking tab closure — no adhesive, no plastic, fully mechanical closure
  • Optional clear PLA window for product visibility without plastic
  • Microwave-safe (up to 100°C) and refrigerator/freezer safe
  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management, EN 13432 compostable certified, EU 1935/2004 food-safe
  • 23 years experience, 18,000 sqm factory, 1.7M boxes daily output

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Meal Prep Delivery Weekly meal prep subscription services Compostable — aligns with sustainability-focused meal prep brand values
Corporate Catering Office lunch boxes for corporate events and daily catering Integrated cutlery compartment eliminates need for separate plastic utensil packs
Takeaway & Food Delivery Restaurant takeaway bento boxes — Asian, Western, fusion cuisines PLA coating handles hot, saucy, and oily foods without leaking for 4+ hours
School & Institutional School lunch programs, hospital meal service, senior care Food-safe certified (EU 1935/2004), no BPA, phthalate-free
Eco-Conscious Retail Pre-packaged fresh meals in supermarket deli and grab-and-go sections Clear PLA window option allows customers to see food without opening
Made-in-China B2B Wholesale OEM sustainable food packaging for global food service brands MOQ 1000, custom print and compartment design, competitive factory-direct pricing

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Board Weight 350gsm (light-duty, cold food), 400gsm (standard), or 450gsm (heavy-duty, hot food)
Barrier Coating PLA coating (standard — compostable), aqueous dispersion coating, or PE-free water-based barrier
Compartments 2-compartment, 3-compartment (standard), or 4-compartment with sauce/dressing cup recess
Cutlery Slot Single slot for fork, double slot for fork + spoon, or triple slot for fork + knife + spoon
Bamboo Cutlery Included with box — fork, knife, spoon, or chopsticks — wrapped in kraft paper band
Printing 1-color soy ink (standard), 2-color, or full CMYK flexo — brand logo, nutritional info, heating instructions
Exterior Finish Natural kraft (standard), white kraft top layer, or clay-coated for sharper print quality
Window No window (standard), PLA window (top or side), or die-cut open window
Closure Locking tab (standard), tuck-top, or sleeve band
Custom Sizes 200×150×50mm (single meal) to 280×200×65mm (large bento) — custom die tooling available
MOQ 1000 units (standard), 3000+ (custom compartment layout or specialty barrier coating)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Kraft Board FSC-certified kraft — 350-450gsm, virgin long-fiber kraft, natural brown color
PLA Coating Aqueous PLA dispersion — 15-20 g/m² application weight, heat-sealable, compostable per EN 13432
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision for compartment dividers and cutlery slot
Creasing & Folding Automatic folder-gluer with pre-creasing — sharp fold lines, ±0.5mm fold registration
Soy-Based Ink Vegetable-based offset ink — >20% soy oil content, low VOC, compostable pigment load
Bamboo Cutlery Natural bamboo — untreated and food-safe, 160mm length, individually kraft-wrapped
PLA Window 30μm transparent PLA film — heat-sealed to interior, compostable, clarity >90% transmission
Adhesive Water-based PVA adhesive, solvent-free — used only on exterior tabs, no food contact
Compostability EN 13432 certified — ≥90% disintegration in 12 weeks, ≥90% biodegradation in 6 months
ISO 9001 Full batch traceability — board FSC certificate, PLA lot, ink batch, QC sign-off

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board weight Grammage scale — 10 samples per batch As specified ±5%
Board caliper Digital micrometer As specified ±0.05mm
PLA coating weight Gravimetric — coat vs uncoat 15-20 g/m²
Grease resistance Kit test — 3M Cobb test Kit level ≥8 at 60°C, 30 min
Water resistance Cobb test — 30 min ≤20 g/m² absorption
Leak test Fill with water, 60° tilt — 4 hours No leakage through seams or corners
Compartment fold accuracy Fold and assemble — 20 units per batch All compartments form correctly, no tearing at crease lines
Bamboo cutlery fit Insert cutlery into slot — 20 units Snug fit, no forced insertion, cutlery wrap intact
Print legibility Visual under D50 All text readable, no smudging, soy ink fully cured
Compostability EN 13432 third-party certification Valid certificate on file, renewed annually
Food contact safety EU 1935/2004 migration test Overall migration ≤10 mg/dm², specific migration limits met
Overall appearance Visual under D50 No stains, crease defects, or coating irregularities

FAQ

Q: Is this bento box truly compostable — what happens to the PLA coating?

item.title: Kraft Paper Cosmetic Skincare Set Box with Die-Cut Tray — Eco Luxury Packaging

item.description:

The 1.5mm rigid kraft greyboard wrapped in 200gsm unbleached kraft paper delivers a warm, organic tactile experience that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. The sliding drawer design — operated by a natural cotton rope pull — combines utility with rustic charm. Printed with soy-based inks and protected by water-based varnish, the entire box is 100% recyclable in standard paper streams and industrially compostable. FSC Chain-of-Custody certified throughout, manufactured in our 18,000 sqm factory with 23 years of expertise serving sustainable brands in 60+ countries.

item.title: Kraft Paper Drawer Box with Rope Handle Eco-Friendly Gift Packaging

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco Gift Box with Seed-Embedded Hang Tag and Soy-Based Ink Printing
item.description:
Product Overview

Packaging that outlives its purpose — quite literally. The box is made from 100% recycled kraft board, printed with soy-based inks, assembled with water-based adhesives, and closed with natural cotton twine. But the defining feature is the hang tag: embedded with a mix of wildflower seeds, it transforms from packaging into a garden when planted.

item.title: Kraft Paper Folding Carton with Soy-Based Ink for Organic Skincare Packaging
item.description: Eco-friendly kraft paper folding carton printed with soy-based inks for organic skincare and natural cosmetics — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise (founded 2003). Every element is chosen for environmental integrity: FSC-certified recycled kraft board (300-450gsm), soy-based CMYK inks (low-VOC, renewable), water-based aqueous coating (plastic-free), and compostable starch-based adhesive. Optional PLA (polylactic acid) window film — plant-derived and industrially compostable to EN 13432 — replaces traditional petroleum-based PET windows. Produced on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with dedicated eco-ink lines across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, 2025 expansion). OK Compost and EN 13432 certified for industrial composting.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Cork Lid and Jute Strap Closure — Bincai Earth-Luxury
item.description:
Product Overview

The earth-luxury kraft paper gift box with natural cork lid and jute strap closure represents the pinnacle of sustainable packaging design — zero plastic, fully biodegradable, and home-compostable without compromise on premium aesthetics. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003, 23 years), a Diamond Member and Audited Supplier on Made-in-China.com. FSC-certified kraft paperboard forms the box body — printed with low-VOC soy-based inks on our KBA Rapida 105 4-color press with Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV for premium finish options. The lid is precision waterjet-cut from 3-5mm natural cork composite — a renewable material harvested from cork oak bark without harming the tree. The closure is a hand-tied 3mm jute twine strap with a simple loop-and-button fastening. Every component is home-compostable (OK Compost HOME certified by TÜV Austria) or recyclable in standard paper streams. Produced across our 18,000 sqm dual-factory complex (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) with 1.7 million boxes daily output.

item.title: Kraft Paper Perfume Rigid Box with Magnetic Closure — Eco-Luxury Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Kraft Paper Perfume Rigid Box with Magnetic Closure definitively proves that luxury and sustainability coexist — without compromise. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — 23 years of paper packaging mastery across an 18,000 sqm eco-conscious manufacturing campus — this box wraps 2.0mm recycled greyboard (85%+ post-consumer content) in FSC certified kraft paper (128gsm, 100% virgin fiber from responsibly managed forests), printed with soy-based inks, and finished with a recycled PET velvet-flocked interior. Every material choice is intentional: the kraft exterior signals environmental stewardship while the magnetic closure and plush interior deliver the premium unboxing that fragrance consumers demand.

item.title: Kraft Paper Planter Gift Box Seed Paper Liner Biodegradable
item.description:
Product Overview

A revolutionary dual-purpose kraft paper gift box that transforms into a planter after use. The removable seed-infused paper liner — embedded with a mix of wildflower seeds (poppy, daisy, cornflower, baby’s breath) — can be placed in soil, watered, and within 7–14 days sprouts into a living wildflower garden. The kraft outer box, printed with soy-based ink and assembled with water-based adhesive, is 100% biodegradable and home-compostable. Manufactured at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., this box delivers a zero-waste unboxing experience that literally gives back to the earth.

item.title: Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box with Compostable PLA Window Soy Ink Dried Flower Tea
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Pyramid Gift Box redefines sustainable packaging with a design that’s beautiful, functional, and 100% home compostable. The distinctive pyramid shape is formed from 350gsm FSC-certified kraft paperboard printed with soy-based inks on our Heidelberg Speedmaster XL 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press lines. A compostable PLA (polylactic acid) window allows the contents — premium loose-leaf tea, dried lavender, chamomile flowers, or artisan botanicals — to be fully visible while maintaining the box’s structural integrity. A natural jute drawstring at the peak doubles as closure and handle. Every component breaks down in a home compost environment within 180 days (EN 13432 certified).

item.title: Kraft Paper Sandwich Wrap Box with PLA Window and Soy-Based Ink for Food Service
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s kraft paper sandwich wrap box with PLA compostable window combines sustainability with food service functionality. The 350gsm unbleached kraft board provides a natural, earthy brand aesthetic while the PLA window — derived from renewable corn starch — offers product visibility and full compostability. Printed with soy-based inks and featuring a water-based grease-resistant interior coating, this box meets EN 13432 and ASTM D6400 standards for industrial and home composting. The auto-lock bottom design enables rapid assembly, making it ideal for high-volume food service operations.

item.title: Kraft Paper Seed-Infused Plantable Gift Box with Biodegradable Soy-Ink Printing
item.description: Kraft paper seed-infused plantable gift box with biodegradable soy-ink printing — a packaging innovation from Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. that transforms from protective packaging into a garden. Each box is made from 100% post-consumer recycled kraft paperboard embedded with a curated blend of non-GMO wildflower seeds (typically a mix of poppy, daisy, cornflower, and black-eyed Susan). After the recipient enjoys the gift, they soak the box in water overnight, plant it in soil, and within 7-21 days the seeds germinate — leaving zero waste. Every element is biodegradable: the board decomposes within 90 days in soil, soy-based inks (heavy-metal-free, VOC-free) break down naturally, and starch-based adhesive dissolves without residue. No plastic windows, no synthetic lamination, no petroleum-based inks. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility under ISO 9001:2015, FSC Chain-of-Custody, and seed quality certification — 23 years of Guangdong manufacturing since 2003.

item.title: Kraft Paper Soap Sleeve Box with Die-Cut Window and Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Product Overview

Our kraft paper soap sleeve box combines minimalist eco-design with product visibility — the die-cut window lets customers see and smell your artisanal soap, bath bomb, or natural skincare product before purchase while the sleeve format keeps packaging material to an absolute minimum. Printed with soy-based offset inks for vibrant yet fully biodegradable graphics, each sleeve is manufactured from FSC-certified kraft board using water-based adhesives. The result: a 100% recyclable, home-compostable package that aligns with the values of eco-conscious brands and consumers. Produced in our ISO 9001-certified facility with daily capacity of 1.5 million boxes, Bincai delivers sustainable packaging at competitive scale.

item.title: Kraft Paper Tube Cylinder Box with Metal Lid Eco-Friendly Cosmetic Packaging
item.description:
Kraft Paper Tube Cylinder Box with Metal Lid — Eco-Conscious Cosmetic Packaging

Meet growing consumer demand for sustainable packaging with Bincai’s kraft paper tube cylinder box. Crafted from FSC-certified kraft paperboard with an elegant metal lid, this packaging solution combines environmental responsibility with premium presentation.

Key Features

  • 100% Recyclable Construction: Kraft paperboard body and base — fully recyclable in standard paper waste streams. Metal lid is separable for dedicated metal recycling.
  • Smooth Interior Finish: Natural kraft interior or optional PLA bio-plastic lining for products requiring moisture or oil barrier protection.
  • Precision Metal Lid: Seamless tinplate or aluminum slip lid with brushed, matte, or polished finish. Embossed logo option available.
  • Water-Based Ink Printing: Full CMYK printing with eco-certified water-based inks on our KBA 1050 4-color offset press — vibrant colors without petroleum solvents.
  • Customizable Dimensions: Diameter from 30mm to 150mm, height from 30mm to 300mm. Standard sizes for popular cosmetic formats.

Product Applications

item.title: FSC Certified Kraft Tray Box with Soy Ink Food-Safe Packaging
item.description:

item.title: FSC Kraft Paper Hinged-Lid Box with Compostable Window Film for Food Display

This is the industry’s most complete end-to-end compostable packaging solution: FSC kraft board, PLA (polylactic acid) window film certified to EN 13432 industrial composting standard, soy-based ink (Müller Martini certified, low-VOC, heavy-metal-free), and water-based compostable coating — every component designed to return to soil in industrial composting facilities within 90 days. item.title: Kraft Eco-Friendly Tuck-Top Mailer Box with Soy Ink Print
item.description:
Product Overview

This eco-friendly kraft tuck-top mailer box by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing delivers sustainable packaging without compromising on print quality or structural integrity. Made from 100% recycled kraft board (350gsm–400gsm) with FSC Chain-of-Custody certification, it features soy-based ink printing for a fully biodegradable packaging solution. The tuck-top closure eliminates the need for tapes or adhesives, simplifying both assembly and recycling. With 23 years of manufacturing expertise and daily output of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm facility, Bincai serves e-commerce brands, subscription box companies, and retailers seeking verified sustainable packaging. Unlike many “eco” boxes that sacrifice print vibrancy, Bincai’s Heidelberg 7+1 UV press with soy-based inks achieves rich, solid colors on kraft surfaces — so your brand doesn’t look washed out. The natural kraft aesthetic resonates with today’s conscious consumers, communicating environmental responsibility before they even open the box. Available with optional FSC, REACH, and RoHS documentation for your compliance records.

item.title: Kraft Food Delivery Box with Window
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Food Delivery Box with Window combines environmental responsibility with practical food presentation. Made from FSC-certified recycled kraft board (300-400gsm) with a clear window, this box lets customers see the food inside while maintaining structural integrity during delivery. Printed with soy-based inks on KBA 1050 4-color presses at Bincai’s 18,000 sqm integrated facility in Foshan, Guangdong. Ideal for bakeries, meal-prep services, salad bars, and sustainable food brands seeking compostable or recyclable takeaway packaging.

item.title: Kraft Mushroom Mycelium Packaging Box — 100% Home-Compostable Custom Print
item.description: Revolutionary mushroom mycelium-based packaging box — grown-to-shape in 7 days using agricultural hemp hurd substrate inoculated with mycelium spores. 100% home-compostable, breaks down in garden soil within 45 days. FSC-certified kraft outer wrap with soy-ink custom printing. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). 18,000 sqm factory with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses. Daily output 1.7 million boxes.

item.title: Kraft Paper Cake Box with Window — Eco-Friendly Bakery Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Bincai’s kraft paper cake box combines eco-credentials with bakery-grade functionality. The FSC certified kraft board provides natural rustic charm, while the die-cut PET window showcases your creations — cakes, cupcakes, pastries, or cookies. The auto-lock bottom assembles in under 3 seconds with no tape or glue. Printed with soy-based inks for full compostability. An optional compostable PLA window film makes the entire box biodegradable. MOQ starts at 1,000 units, produced in our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility. 23 years of sustainable packaging expertise.

item.title: Kraft Paper Eco Box with Seed-Embedded Tag Sustainable Gift Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Earth-conscious kraft paper eco gift box with a plantable seed-embedded hang tag — packaging that gives back to the planet after unboxing. Produced at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), our Foshan factory spans 18,000 sqm (10,000+8,000 smart factory) with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, delivering 1.7 million boxes daily. ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified. Printed with soy-based inks on FSC-certified kraft paperboard. The detachable hang tag is embedded with wildflower seeds — customers plant it and grow flowers, transforming packaging waste into blooming gardens. Certified compostable to ASTM D6400 standard with ≥90% biodegradation within 180 days.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Cotton Handle and Soy Ink Printing FSC Certified
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Gift Box with Cotton Handle and Soy Ink Printing offers a fully sustainable packaging solution for eco-conscious brands. Constructed from FSC-certified kraft paperboard printed with soy-based inks, each box features a natural cotton rope carry handle and is fully recyclable and biodegradable. Manufactured at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility with 23 years of paper box expertise, Bincai produces 1.7 million boxes daily across KBA 1050 and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press lines while maintaining ISO 9001 and FSC chain-of-custody certifications. This plastic-free gift box eliminates petroleum-based materials entirely — from the unbleached kraft structure to the undyed cotton handle and water-based adhesives.

item.title: Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Hemp Rope Handle and Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Gift Box with Natural Hemp Rope Handle represents our commitment to plastic-free, fully biodegradable luxury packaging. Every component — from the 350gsm FSC-certified uncoated kraft board to the 5mm natural hemp rope handle to the soy-based CMYK inks — is chosen for end-of-life compostability and recyclability in standard paper streams. The hemp rope handle is threaded through reinforced die-cut slots (no metal eyelets, no plastic rivets), creating a rustic-meets-premium aesthetic that resonates with today’s eco-conscious consumers. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of expertise — this box is a bestseller for sustainable fashion brands, organic skincare companies, and artisan food producers across 60+ export markets. Our dual factories produce 1.7M+ boxes daily, with dedicated eco-production lines using water-based adhesives and renewable energy.

item.title: Kraft Paper Shoulder Box with Magnetic Snap Closure and Custom Divider — Eco-Friendly Gift Set Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Shoulder Box with Magnetic Snap Closure bridges the gap between uncompromising eco-credentials and luxury gift presentation — proving that sustainability and premium branding are not mutually exclusive. The box body is crafted from FSC-certified kraft liner (250gsm) wrapped over 1600gsm recycled greyboard, creating a sturdy rigid structure with the warm, organic texture of natural kraft. The magnetic snap closure (concealed NdFeB magnets) provides the premium tactile experience buyers expect from gift packaging, while soy-based ink printing (1-2 colors) keeps the entire box 100% recyclable in standard paper streams — no de-lamination, no plastic film separation, no landfill. Inside, custom kraft card dividers (die-cut from the same FSC stock) organize multiple products — tea sachets, honey jars, soap bars, candle tins — into a beautifully organized gift set. At Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC certified with 23 years of manufacturing excellence — every box is produced on our dual-factory Heidelberg 7+1 UV and KBA Rapida 105 press lines, delivering 220,000+ boxes daily with full FSC chain-of-custody documentation.

item.title: Kraft Paper Watch Box with Cotton Strap Eco-Friendly Custom Logo
item.description:
Product Overview

The Bincai Kraft Paper Watch Box combines sustainability with premium presentation — proving that eco-friendly doesn’t mean sacrificing quality. The natural kraft paperboard exterior, cotton pull strap, and soy-based ink printing create a 100% biodegradable packaging solution for environmentally conscious watch brands. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. in our FSC Chain-of-Custody certified facility, each box uses FSC-certified kraft paperboard, vegetable-based adhesives, and unbleached cotton strapping. Our 18,000 sqm Foshan factory (10,000 sqm original + 8,000 sqm smart expansion, 2025) produces 220,000+ gift boxes daily, with a dedicated eco-packaging line running 100% renewable energy for select production runs. ISO 9001:2015 quality management ensures every box meets the same rigorous standards as our luxury non-eco lines.

item.title: Luxury Paper Gift Bag with Ribbon Handle Custom Logo Print
item.description:
Product Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — a Diamond Member on Made-in-China.com with 23 years of paper packaging expertise since 2003 — presents this luxury paper gift bag with satin ribbon handle and custom logo print, engineered for premium retail brands that demand both elegance and eco-responsibility. Operating from an 18,000 sqm manufacturing campus in Foshan’s Shunde district with a daily output of 1.7 million color-printed boxes and 220,000+ gift boxes, Bincai combines KBA 1050 offset and Heidelberg 7+1 UV press technology with ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certifications to deliver retail-ready gift bags that elevate brand perception at every touchpoint. Each bag is constructed from heavyweight FSC-certified kraft or art paper, fitted with a luxurious satin ribbon drawstring handle, and printed with soy-based or UV-cured inks — creating a fully customizable, plastic-free packaging solution suitable for boutique retail, luxury gifting, corporate events, and premium e-commerce unboxing experiences.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Paper Magnetic Gift Box — Eco-Luxury Sustainable Packaging
item.description:
Product Overview

Recyclable brown kraft paper rigid gift box with magnetic closure — designed by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003) for brands that demand luxurious presentation without compromising on sustainability. Made from 100% FSC-certified recycled greyboard and wrapped in natural unbleached kraft paper, the entire box is fully recyclable in standard paper waste streams — no delamination, no mixed materials. Printed with soy-based inks (VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy-metal free) and assembled with water-based PVA adhesive (FDA 21 CFR 175.105 compliant), every component is chosen for end-of-life circularity. The N35 neodymium magnetic closure delivers the premium unboxing experience customers expect, while the natural kraft aesthetic with subtle embossed branding creates an authentic, artisanal feel that resonates with eco-conscious consumers. Produced across 18,000 sqm on KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses with 1.7 million daily box output.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Paper Gift Box with Soy Ink Printing 100% Biodegradable
item.description:
Product Overview

The 100% biodegradable recycled kraft paper gift box with soy ink printing — the definitive eco-luxury packaging solution for brands that refuse to compromise between sustainability and premium presentation. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. — ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with 23 years of manufacturing excellence — this box is constructed from 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) kraft paper (200–400gsm), printed with soy-based offset inks (VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy metal-free, EN 71-3 compliant), bonded with water-based PVA adhesive (FDA 21 CFR 175.105 food-contact compliant), and finished with aqueous recyclable coating — every material chosen for end-of-life biodegradability without sacrificing structural integrity or print vibrancy. Certified to ASTM D6400 for industrial composting, this box breaks down within 6–12 weeks in commercial facilities (3–6 months home compostable in uncoated configuration) — returning safely to the earth, unlike conventional boxes with petroleum-based inks and plastic laminations that persist for centuries. Produced on KBA Rapida 105 4-color and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses at our 18,000 sqm Foshan facility — delivering 1.7M+ boxes daily with a dedicated eco-grade material inventory and segregated production workflow for genuine sustainability integrity.

item.title: Recycled Kraft Paper Window Gift Box with FSC Certification
item.description:
Product Overview

This recycled kraft paper window gift box combines eco-conscious materials with product visibility — the perfect packaging for brands that want to showcase their product while demonstrating sustainability commitments. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (established 2003, Foshan, China), the box uses 350gsm post-consumer recycled kraft board with FSC Chain-of-Custody certification. The die-cut window can be fitted with crystal-clear recyclable PET or compostable PLA film for fully biodegradable packaging. Soy-based ink printing delivers crisp, low-VOC branding on the natural kraft surface. With daily capacity of 1.7 million boxes from our 18,000 sqm integrated facility, Bincai supports brands scaling from boutique craft runs to high-volume retail production.

item.title: Biodegradable Kraft Paper Box Eco-Friendly Cosmetics Packaging
item.description:
Biodegradable kraft paper box engineered for eco-conscious cosmetics brands — by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd. (founded 2003), a full-chain packaging enterprise with 23 years of manufacturing excellence. 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory) equipped with KBA 1050 4-color and Heidelberg 7+1 UV presses, daily output 1.7 million boxes. FSC Chain-of-Custody certified with soy-based inks and 100% recyclable materials.

Applications

  • Organic skincare and natural cosmetics product packaging
  • Eco-friendly soap, candle, and bath bomb gift sets
  • Zero-waste beauty subscription box outer packaging
  • Sustainable brand retail countertop display boxes
  • Green beauty e-commerce mailer-ready product boxes
  • Refillable cosmetics packaging with reusable kraft construction
  • Plastic-free personal care and wellness product boxes

Customization Options

  • Material: 200–400gsm recycled kraft paper in natural brown, bleached white kraft, or custom-dyed kraft; 100% post-consumer recycled (PCR) options
  • Printing: Soy-based CMYK offset printing — VOC-free, REACH compliant; single-color kraft aesthetic for minimalist brands
  • Structure: Straight tuck end (STE), reverse tuck end (RTE), auto-lock bottom, crash-lock bottom, gable-top, or drawer-slide
  • Window: Die-cut window with FSC-certified clear PLA (compostable) film or traditional PET window
  • Coatings: Aqueous coating (water-based, fully recyclable); matte or gloss biodegradable lamination
  • Add-Ons: Jute twine, cotton pull handle, kraft paper ribbon tie, embossed FSC/recycle logo, soy-based foil stamping
  • Size Range: Compact 60×60×30mm (lip balm) to 350×250×100mm (gift set)

Production Specifications

  • KBA Rapida 105 4-color: High-speed offset press running soy-based inks at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV: Specialty aqueous coatings and instant curing for eco finishes
  • Die-Cutting: Bobst SP 102 flatbed with ±0.15mm registration; custom cutting dies for unique silhouettes
  • Gluing: Bobst Ambition automatic folder-gluer with water-based cold glue; 40,000 boxes/hour
  • Greyboard: FSC-certified recycled greyboard 800–1200gsm; double-ply lamination for structural rigidity
  • Ink System: Soy-based offset ink — VOC ≤ 0.5%, heavy metal free, EN 71-3 and ASTM F963 compliant
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days new tooling; 7–10 days repeat orders

Quality & Sustainability

  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management — documented inspection at each production stage
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody — certified sustainable fiber from forest to finished box
  • Biodegradability: ASTM D6400 industrial composting certified (kraft + soy ink + aqueous coating only)
  • Adhesive: Water-based PVA emulsion — no solvent residue, food contact compliant (FDA 21 CFR 175.105)
  • Recyclability: 100% repulpable in standard paper recycling streams (non-PET configurations)
  • Color Consistency: Delta E ≤ 2.5 across production runs even on uncoated kraft surface
  • Moisture Resistance: Optional water-based barrier coating for humidity-prone environments
  • Free pre-production sample with 5–7 day turnaround

Factory

  • 23 years of manufacturing excellence since 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong, China
  • 18,000 sqm factory (10,000+8,000 smart factory, expanded 2025)
  • 80+ skilled employees across design, prepress, printing, and finishing
  • KBA 1050 4-color + Heidelberg 7+1 UV + Bobst die-cutting + automatic folder-gluer
  • FSC-certified material sourcing with dedicated eco-grade inventory
  • Daily capacity: 1.7 million boxes (50,000+ kraft eco boxes dedicated)
  • Export to 40+ countries with sustainable packaging as a strategic product category

Eco Claims That Hold Up

In an era of greenwashing scrutiny, every sustainability claim on this box is backed by a named standard, a certificate number, or a measurable metric:

item.title: Eco Kraft Paper Rigid Box with Embossing Soy-Based Ink
item.description:
Eco Kraft Paper Rigid Box with Embossing & Soy-Based Ink

An uncompromisingly sustainable rigid gift box that proves eco-friendly packaging can be premium — manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., an ISO 9001:2015 and FSC Chain-of-Custody certified packaging enterprise with 23 years of experience (founded 2003). Designed for brands committed to sustainable packaging without sacrificing luxury presentation, this rigid box combines the natural, tactile aesthetic of FSC-certified kraft paper (128–200gsm, natural brown, black kraft, or white kraft) with precision blind embossing and debossing that creates sophisticated brand texture purely through pressure — zero ink, zero foil, zero plastic. When color is needed, we print with environmentally responsible soy-based inks that emit less than 10% of the volatile organic compounds (VOCs) of petroleum-based inks while delivering brighter, more intense colors on uncoated kraft surfaces. Every box is fully biodegradable, recyclable in single-stream systems, and meets EU EN 13432 and US ASTM D6400 compostability standards. Produced on German-engineered KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset and Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV presses with Bobst flatbed die-cutting across our 18,000 sqm dual factory (10,000+8,000 sqm smart factory, commissioned 2025) in Foshan, Guangdong. Daily output of 1.7 million color boxes plus 220,000+ rigid gift boxes. MOQ 500 with free pre-production samples in 5–7 working days.

Applications

Industry Application Key Feature
Organic Skincare Serum, cream, and balm gift sets Soy-ink printed kraft aligns with natural brand identity

Customization Options

Option Available Choices
Box Structure Drawer-style slide-out, hinged lid, two-piece telescopic, or tuck-top
Kraft Paper Grade 120gsm, 150gsm, 200gsm — natural brown, bleached white, or recycled grey
Greyboard Core 800gsm–1600gsm for structural rigidity

Cotton Pull Handle Natural, black, or custom-dyed — tensile-tested for 5kg+ pull strength

Interior Options Kraft dividers, recycled greyboard partitions, shredded kraft fill
Window Options PLA biodegradable film window, FSC-certified cellulose window, or open window cutout
Custom Sizes 100×80×40mm to 350×250×100mm — custom tooling available

MOQ 500 units (standard), 1000+ (custom tooling or custom-dyed handles)

Production Specifications

Specification Detail
Offset Press KBA 1050 4-color — high-speed precision on kraft stock with natural color retention
UV Press Heidelberg 7+1 UV — for specialty finishes on kraft
Die-Cutting Bobst automatic flatbed die-cutter — ±0.3mm precision
Drawer Assembly Automated rigid box line with drawer slide mechanism
Board Core 800gsm–1600gsm greyboard, FSC-certified
Kraft Wrap 120gsm–200gsm natural kraft, bleached white kraft, or recycled grey kraft
Inks Soy-based, water-based, or UV — all certified for food-safe indirect contact
Cotton Handle 3mm braided cotton cord, tensile-tested at 5kg+ pull strength

Adhesives Water-based PVA (no VOC), hot-melt for drawer assembly
ISO 9001 Full process documentation at each station — material receiving through pack-out audit

Quality Assurance

Inspection Point Method Standard
Board grammage Digital scale ±1gsm Within spec tolerance
Moisture content Pin-type moisture meter ≤8%
Drawer slide tolerance Gap gauge ±0.5mm — smooth, no binding
Cotton handle pull strength Tensile test machine ≥5kg before failure
Handle attachment Manual pull test 100% No grommet tear-out, no knot slip
Soy ink adhesion Tape test per ASTM D3359 5B (no removal)
Print registration Overlay template ±0.15mm
Color consistency Spectrophotometer ΔE ≤2.0 from target
Surface inspection Visual under D50 lighting No scuffs, ink smudges, or water spots
Recyclability verification Material audit 100% recyclable — no mixed materials, no plastic lamination
FSC chain of custody Document audit per shipment FSC-STD-40-004 compliance
Compostability (PLA window) EN 13432 certification Home compostable within 180 days
AQL sampling ISO 2859-1 Level II AQL 2.5 (major), AQL 1.0 (minor)

Why This Kraft Drawer Box

  • Cotton pull handle vs. plastic — 3mm braided cotton cord tensile-tested at 5kg+; biodegradable and tactile, replacing nylon or grosgrain ribbon tabs
  • FSC-certified kraft board — 350gsm recycled kraft with full chain-of-custody traceability; accepted in standard curbside recycling without separating components
  • Flat-ship drawer design — ships knocked-down for 60% freight volume savings; assembles in under 20 seconds with pre-scored crease lines, no adhesive required
  • Reuse-first engineering — drawer mechanism designed for 200+ open/close cycles; customers repurpose as desk organizers, jewelry storage, or seed boxes
  • Soy-based inks only — zero petroleum-based solvents; prints remain vivid on uncoated kraft with ΔE ≤2.0 color consistency batch-to-batch
Factor Generic Gift Box Bincai Kraft Drawer Box
Material Virgin bleached cardboard FSC recycled kraft 350gsm
Handle Plastic tab or none Braided cotton cord, 5kg+ rated
Closure Tuck-flap or magnetic Smooth drawer slide ±0.5mm tolerance

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Cardboard Box with Soy Ink Printing
item.description:
Overview

Guangdong Bincai Color Printing’s recyclable kraft cardboard box with soy ink printing represents the purest expression of sustainable packaging. Every component — from the FSC certified kraft paperboard and recycled greyboard core to the soy-based inks and water-based adhesives — is chosen for end-of-life recyclability and biodegradability. Zero plastic. Zero solvent emissions. Full compostability in industrial facilities.

Manufacturing Excellence & Equipment

Manufactured in our ISO 9001:2015 certified 18,000 sqm dual-factory (10,000 sqm main plant + 8,000 sqm smart factory commissioned 2025), every kraft box is printed using soy-based vegetable inks on the Heidelberg Speedmaster CD 102 7+1 UV with inter-deck UV curing for instant-dry, scuff-resistant output — or the KBA Rapida 105 4-color offset press running at 15,000 sheets/hour for high-volume CMYK production. Blind embossing and debossing (maintaining full recyclability without foil) is executed on the Bobst SP 102 BMA with ±0.15mm registration precision.

item.title: Recyclable Kraft Rigid Box with Soy Ink Printing Eco Luxury
item.description:
Fully recyclable kraft rigid box with soy-based ink printing — combining luxury rigid box construction with uncompromising environmental responsibility. No plastic lamination, no solvent-based adhesives, no mixed-material construction that prevents recycling. Manufactured by Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., FSC Chain-of-Custody certified.

Applications

  • Sustainable Brands: Organic skincare, natural cosmetics, eco-friendly fashion, zero-waste lifestyle products
  • Premium Food: Artisan chocolate, specialty coffee, organic tea, craft honey, small-batch granola
  • Corporate Eco Kits: Sustainable employee welcome kits, eco-conference materials, green initiative launch boxes
  • Subscription Boxes: Monthly eco-lifestyle boxes, farm-to-table produce boxes, sustainable beauty subscriptions
  • Gift Packaging: Eco-conscious holiday gifting, wedding favors, baby shower gifts, housewarming presents
  • Product Launches: Limited-edition sustainable product releases, brand collaboration boxes

Customization Options

  • Kraft Paper Grade: Natural brown kraft (unbleached), white kraft (bleached), black kraft, colored kraft (earth tones); recycled content 30%–100% post-consumer waste
  • Printing: Soy/vegetable-based ink in 1–4 colors; single-color minimalist branding, two-color logo + pattern, full CMYK for photographic designs
  • Finishing (Plastic-Free): Blind debossing, embossing without foil, laser engraving on kraft surface, water-based matte coating (compostable), natural twine/jute string tie
  • Box Structure: Standard rigid (lid + base), book-style with kraft hinge, drawer slide, pillow box shape, fold-flat rigid for shipping efficiency
  • Interior: Kraft paper lining, unbleached cotton padding, shredded kraft crinkle paper, molded pulp insert (100% recycled), corrugated cardboard dividers
  • Closure: Jute string tie, cotton ribbon, kraft paper belly band, cardboard latch, magnetic closure with kraft-covered magnets
  • Add-Ons: Kraft hang tag with jute string, seed-embedded paper insert card (plantable), kraft tissue paper with soy-ink logo, cardboard thank-you card
  • Size: Fully custom — from 80×80×40mm to 400×300×120mm

Production Specifications

  • Board Stock: 100% recycled greyboard 1200–1800gsm; FSC Recycled certified; no virgin fiber in board construction
  • Kraft Wrap: 120–200gsm kraft paper; natural brown or custom-dyed with water-based dyes (heavy metal-free)
  • Soy Ink: 100% soy/vegetable-based offset ink; VOC-free, low migration; certified compostable ink residues
  • Adhesive: Water-based PVA adhesive (solvent-free, formaldehyde-free); starch-based adhesive for paper-to-paper bonds
  • No Plastic Policy: Zero plastic lamination, zero synthetic coatings, zero PVC windows, zero foam inserts (molded pulp or corrugated board only)
  • KBA 1050: Soy ink printing at 15,000 sheets/hour
  • Lead Time: 10–15 working days; 5–7 days for repeat orders
  • Daily Capacity: 30,000–50,000 kraft rigid boxes

Quality Details

  • ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management
  • FSC Chain-of-Custody (FSC-C147399) — full traceability from forest to finished box
  • Recyclability Verification: 100% paper fiber construction verified per EN 13430; suitable for standard paper recycling streams
  • Compostability: All components (board, paper, ink, adhesive) certified home-compostable by independent lab per EN 13432
  • Soy Ink Certification: American Soybean Association soy seal compliant; heavy metal content below detection limits
  • Adhesive Safety: EN 71-3 (toy safety) and FDA 21 CFR 175.105 (indirect food contact) compliant
  • Drop Test: ISTA 1A protocol — rigid board construction provides equivalent protection to traditional non-eco boxes
  • Free pre-production sample — 5–7 working days

Factory

  • 23 years manufacturing experience (founded 2003)
  • 18,000 sqm facility (10,000+8,000 smart facility
  • Dedicated eco-packaging line with soy ink press setup and water-based adhesive systems
  • KBA 1050 4-color press optimized for kraft paper and soy ink
  • Export to 40+ countries worldwide
  • Daily output: 1.7 million boxes total

FAQ

Q: Is this box truly 100% recyclable and compostable? A: Yes. All components — greyboard (100% recycled fiber), kraft paper wrap, soy-based ink, and water-based PVA adhesive — are certified home-compostable per EN 13432 and recyclable per EN 13430. Zero plastic lamination, zero synthetic coatings, zero PVC.
